items.titleZh: 輔大醫院成立兒少保護區域整合中心 攜手扶輪推動社區支持行動計畫
items.titleEn: Fu Jen University Hospital Establishes Regional Integration Center for the Protection of Children and Adolescents Works Together with Rotary to Promote Community Support Action Plan
items.bodyZh:
輔大醫院供稿】為強化兒童及少年保護體系之整合與前端預防功能，輔仁大學附設醫院今（20）日舉行「兒少保護區域醫療整合中心」揭牌儀式，並同步啟動「輔仁校院兒少保護與社區支持行動計畫」。中心已獲衛生福利部核定設立，成為全台第13家區域整合據點，未來將攜手台北永福扶輪社及跨領域夥伴，推動醫療、教育與社區資源整合，建構更完善之兒少保護網絡。

中心主任范修平表示，過往兒少保護多於傷害發生後才啟動介入，但實務上，許多風險早已在學校、社區甚至醫療現場中出現，卻未被及時辨識與接住。此次透過整合中心的成立與行動計畫的推動，將以「兒童最佳利益」為核心，建構跨專業、跨系統的合作機制，讓守護向前延伸，在關鍵時刻更早發揮作用。 　

在整合中心運作上，輔大醫院整合兒虐個案管理、創傷評估與心理治療及親職支持等服務，並串聯社政、警政及區域醫療體系，建立即時通報與介入機制，同時透過教育訓練與跨院合作，提升第一線人員對兒少風險的辨識能力與處遇品質，全面強化兒少保護量能。 　

此外，「兒少保護與社區支持行動計畫」進一步將服務從醫院延伸至社區，聚焦醫療服務、社區支持、校院合作及親職教育等4大面向。計畫內容包括強化兒少心理健康服務、建立即時諮詢平台、擴展社區合作據點、導入大學生志工參與，以及提升家庭與照顧者支持能力，補足現行體系在早期辨識與預防上的關鍵缺口，讓守護網絡真正走入孩子的日常生活。


▲圖說：新北市政府社會局李美珍局長蒞臨致詞。 

台北永福扶輪社長期關注婦幼與弱勢議題，自2017年起投入兒少保護工作，累計捐助逾新台幣2200萬元，支持兒童友善醫療環境建置及系統性服務發展。此次與輔仁校院攜手推動行動計畫，期望讓兒少保護從事後處置走向前端預防，將善意轉化為制度性力量，持續補強社會安全網。 　

輔大醫院院長黃瑞仁表示，兒少保護不僅是醫療議題，更是整體社會共同的責任，透過區域整合中心的成立與跨界合作的推動，將醫療專業向外延伸，串聯教育與社會資源，讓保護網更早啟動、更緊密運作，真正做到在風險尚未擴大前即時介入。 　未來，輔大醫院兒少保護區域醫療整合中心將持續以創傷知情照護為基礎，深化醫療與社區的整合，讓守護不只存在於醫院之中，更落實於孩子生活的每一個場域，實踐「讓孩子更早被看見、更穩被接住」的願景。
items.bodyEn:
[Fu Jen University Hospital Contribution] In order to strengthen the integration of the child and adolescent protection system and the front-end prevention function, Fujian University Hospital held the inauguration ceremony of the "Regional Medical Integration Center for Child and Adolescent Protection" today (20), and simultaneously launched the "Fujian University College Action Plan for Child and Adolescent Protection and Community Support".The center has been approved by the Ministry of Health and Welfare and has become the 13th regional integration base in Taiwan. In the future, we will work with Taipei Yongfu Rotary Club and cross-disciplinary partners to promote the integration of medical, education and community resources to build a better network for the protection of children and children.

Fan Xiuping, director of the center, said that in the past, there was more child protection than injury before intervention was initiated, but in practice, many risks have already appeared in schools, communities and even medical sites, but they have not been identified and caught in time.Through the establishment of the integration center and the promotion of the action plan, we will build a cross-professional and cross-system cooperation mechanism with the "best interests of children" as the core, so that the guardian can extend forward and play a role earlier at critical moments. 　

In the operation of the integration center, the hospital integrates services such as child abuse case management, trauma assessment, psychological treatment and parental support, and connects with social affairs, police and regional medical systems to establish real-time notification and intervention mechanisms. At the same time, through education and training and cross-hospital cooperation, it improves the first-line personnel to treat children less The ability to identify risks and the quality of treatment, comprehensively strengthen the ability of children to have less protection. 　

In addition, the Action Plan for Children and Youth Protection and Community Support further extends services from hospitals to the community, focusing on four major aspects: medical services, community support, school cooperation and parental education.The plan includes strengthening mental health services for children and adolescents, establishing a real-time consultation platform, expanding community cooperative bases, introducing college student volunteer participation, and improving the support capacity of families and caregivers to fill the key gaps in the early identification and prevention of the current system, so that the guardian network can truly enter the daily life of children.


▲Picture: Li Meizhen, Director of the Social Affairs Bureau of the New Taipei Municipal Government, came to deliver a speech. 

Taipei Yongfu Rotary Club has long been concerned about women, children and vulnerable issues. Since 2017, it has invested in the protection of children and children, and has donated more than NT $22 million to support the construction of a child-friendly medical environment and the development of systematic services.This time, we will work with the Fu Jen School to promote the action plan, with the expectation that children will be protected from post-treatment to front-end prevention, goodwill will be transformed into institutional strength, and the social safety net will continue to be strengthened. 　

Huang Ruiren, president of Fu University Hospital, said that the protection of children and young children is not only a medical issue, but also a common responsibility of the whole society. Through the establishment of regional integration centers and the promotion of cross-border cooperation, , extend the medical profession outward, connect education and social resources, so that the protection network can be activated earlier and operate more closely, and truly intervene in real time before the risk has expanded. 　In the future, the Regional Medical Integration Center for the Protection of Children in Fu University Hospital will continue to deepen the integration of medical care and community based on trauma-informed care, so that guardianship not only exists in the hospital, but also in every area of children's lives, and realizes the vision of "allowing children to be seen earlier and be more steadily caught".


▲Picture: President Lan Yizhen of Furen University (left) and President Huang Ruiren of Fu University Hospital (right) especially thanked Taipei Yongfu Rotary Club for its long-term attention to women, children and vulnerable issues.


▲Illustration of guests attending the kick-off ceremony.

items.titleZh: 【用同樣的學費，走一段法國的學習歷程】
items.bodyZh: 【用同樣的學費，走一段法國的學習歷程】March 18, 2026 國際經管imMBA近期與法國 KEDGE Business School 完成新一輪學術合作續約，延續雙方長期夥伴關係，並持續為學生提供雙聯與國際學習機會。 KEDGE 為法國具國際知名度的商學院之一，校區橫跨巴黎、波爾多與馬賽。該校在QS 2025商業與管理領域排名全球51-100名，並同時通過 AACSB、EQUIS與AMBA三大國際商管認證，為全球僅約1%具備三重認證（Triple Crown）的商學院之一。 透過雙聯學術合約，國際經管imMBA學生有機會在僅繳交母校學雜費的前提下，前往法國留學。 KEDGE最新選修模組正規劃中，預計將於近期公布。 #輔大國際經管 #跨國雙碩士 #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree
items.bodyEn: 【Study in France—with the same tuition】March 18, 2026 The MBA Program in International Management (imMBA) has renewed its academic partnership with KEDGE Business School in France, continuing a long-standing collaboration and offering students dual-degree and international learning opportunities. KEDGE, with campuses in Paris, Bordeaux, and Marseille, is ranked 51–100 worldwide in QS 2025 Business & Management Studies and holds the prestigious Triple Crown accreditation (AACSB, EQUIS, AMBA), achieved by only about 1% of business schools globally. Through this dual-degree program, imMBA students may study in France while paying tuition at their home institution. New elective modules at KEDGE are currently in development, with more details to be announced soon. #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree

items.titleZh: 【上週末的輔大開箱日，你也來逛校園了嗎？】
items.titleEn: 【Did you visit Fu Jen's Open House last weekend?】
items.bodyZh: 【上週末的輔大開箱日，你也來逛校園了嗎？】March 11, 2026 上週末輔大開箱日許多系所打開教室與實驗室，透過課程介紹、互動體驗與校園導覽，讓莘莘學子認識各系所的學習樣貌。 對許多同學來說，這是探索大學科系的第一步。而在大學之後，學習選擇仍會延伸。 輔大管理學院有一個走向國際的碩士選項—國際經管imMBA，就很適合想繼續在商管領域深造的學子。這裡的課程全英語授課，學生來自不同國家、文化與背景，在同一個教室討論商業議題、交換觀點。 透過與海外商學院簽署的跨國雙碩士課程，國際經管的學生也有機會到歐美留學，在更有效率的學習規劃下，完成一段跨國學習旅程。 如果說開箱日是認識輔大的開始，對有些同學來說，下一站或許會在國際經管imMBA。 #輔大國際經管 #跨國雙碩士 #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree
items.bodyEn: 【Did you visit Fu Jen's Open House last weekend?】March 11, 2026 Departments across campus opened their classrooms and labs, giving students a glimpse into different fields of study. For many, it's the first step in exploring a future major. But learning paths often continue beyond undergraduate studies. At the College of Management, the MBA program in International Management (imMBA) offers an internationally focused graduate option. Courses are taught entirely in English, bringing together students from diverse countries and backgrounds. Through dual-degree partnerships with overseas business schools, imMBA students may also have the opportunity to study in Europe or the United States. If the Open House is the beginning of discovering Fu Jen, the next step for some may be imMBA. #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree

items.titleZh: 【為什麼我們能與海外名校展開合作對話？】
items.bodyZh: 【為什麼我們能與海外名校展開合作對話？】March 4, 2026 當我們拓展跨國雙聯學術合作時，很多人會問：學分真的能順利銜接嗎？ 關鍵之一，是輔大管理學院通過的AACSB 國際認證。 AACSB(Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business)為全球最具代表性的商學院認證之一，全球僅約5%-6%商學院獲此認證。 這不是會員資格，而是一項經嚴格審查與定期追蹤的國際品質認證，代表課程設計、師資結構與學習成效均符合全球商管教育標準。 國際經管imMBA作為管院的國際化平台，所有課程全英語授課，營造與國際商管教育同步的學習環境。 這些制度背後，最直接受益的是學生。對學生而言，這代表： ✔課程設計符合國際商管教育標準 ✔學分審查與對接有共通依據 ✔合作建立在對等品質基礎上 合作能展開，前提是彼此站在同一個國際標準上。 #輔大國際經管 #跨國雙碩士 #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree
items.bodyEn: 【What Enables International Collaboration?】March 4, 2026 As we continue to expand international dual-degree partnerships, a common question is: can credits transfer smoothly across universities? One key reason is AACSB accreditation, earned by the College of Management at Fu Jen Catholic University. Only about 5-6% of business schools worldwide hold this distinction. AACSB is a rigorous international accreditation that recognizes high standards in curriculum design, faculty quality, and learning outcomes. At the same time, the MBA in International Management (imMBA), the College of Management’s flagship international program, is delivered fully in English, creating a globally oriented learning environment. For students, this means: ✔ Curriculum aligned with international standards ✔ A clear framework for credit transfer ✔ Partnerships built on comparable academic standards ✔ A degree with stronger global recognition International collaboration begins when institutions share the same academic standards. #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree

items.titleZh: 【國際合作版圖再拓展｜即將迎來第一所來自英國的大學】
items.titleEn: 【International Collaboration Expands | Advancing Our First UK Academic Partnership】
items.bodyZh: 【國際合作版圖再拓展｜即將迎來第一所來自英國的大學】Feb. 25, 2026 為持續拓展國際經管imMBA的全球合作網絡，我們近期與英國University of Stirling展開雙聯學術合作洽談並獲得實質進展。 該校位於蘇格蘭，為英國公立研究型大學，在多項國際大學排名中名列全球前段班。其商管、行銷與永續發展領域具備國際聲譽。 若順利完成合作細節確認及相關行政簽署程序，University of Stirling將成為國際經管imMBA與英國大專院校首次合作，亦將為同學開啟嶄新的海外留學選項。 目前合作內容仍在確認階段，待程序完成後，將正式對外公告。 國際連結持續推進中，敬請期待。 #輔大國際經管 #跨國雙碩士 #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree 圖說：雙聯學術合約跨國線上會議 左為Stirling代表 Ms. Rui Brown, Intl. Progression Partnerships Manager 右為國際經管碩士班imMBA 杜逸寧主任
items.bodyEn: 【International Collaboration Expands | Advancing Our First UK Academic Partnership】Feb. 25, 2026 To further strengthen the global partnership network of the imMBA program, we have recently initiated dual-degree academic collaboration discussions with the University of Stirling in the United Kingdom and have made substantive progress. Located in Scotland, the University of Stirling is a public research university and is ranked among the leading institutions globally. Its strengths in business, marketing, and sustainability have earned strong international recognition. Subject to the completion of ongoing discussions and the required administrative procedures, the University of Stirling would become the first UK higher education institution to partner with the imMBA program. This collaboration will open up a new overseas study option for our students. The details of the partnership are currently being finalized. A formal announcement will be made once all procedures have been completed. Our international connections continue to grow—stay tuned. #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree Photo caption: Online cross-border meeting for the dual-degree academic agreement Left: Ms. Rui Brown, International Progression Partnerships Manager, University of Stirling Right: Chair Tu Yi-Ning, imMBA Program

items.titleZh: 【走出去之後，開始用不一樣的角度看世界】
items.bodyZh: 2026/02/11 【走出去之後，開始用不一樣的角度看世界】 Feb. 11, 2026 「我認為出國最大的收穫之一，是能夠從不同角度理解全球市場與產業趨勢。」 同學所說的「不同角度」，不只是課本上的理論比較，而是親身進入另一個社會與制度中，看見許多不同於台灣習以為常的運作方式。無論是企業決策、社會議題，甚至人們對工作的期待，都與原本熟悉的環境不同。 正是這些日常運作上的差異，讓她開始意識到：所謂的「趨勢」，其實是被大量實踐、逐漸成形的共同行動。例如 ESG，這幾年在台灣雖然被大量討論，卻常停留在概念層次；而在國外， ESG 不是口號而是融入日常生活與企業文化。 同學分享，這樣的對比經驗逐漸改變了她看待台灣的視角。「過去，我可能會替一些不夠完善的現象合理化，將其視為一種『台灣 style』；然而，在親身走過不同社會與國度之後，開始更清楚辨識哪些地方仍有進步空間，也值得被改善。」 走出去之後，多了一層理解，也多了一份思辨，視野自然隨之展開。 #輔大國際經管 #跨國雙碩士 #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree

items.titleZh: 【在國際經管上課，是什麼感覺？】
items.titleEn: 【What does it feel like to study in the imMBA program?】
items.bodyZh: 2026/02/04 【在國際經管上課，是什麼感覺？】 返回公告列表 【在國際經管上課，是什麼感覺？】 Feb. 4, 2026 很多同學直覺反應是，你大概很難隱形。 「國際經管課程多為小班制，老師能夠顧及每一位學生，學習上不容易被忽略，也更有參與感。」這是同學回顧在國際經管上課時，第一個提到的感受。 全英文授課的環境，一開始並不輕鬆，但整體氛圍讓人無法躲在角落。同學形容，在課堂上幾乎不可能不說英文，因為老師會鼓勵每一位學生開口表達自己的想法。「久而久之，自信心也跟著建立起來。」 有時候課堂形式並不侷限聽講與交報告；有些課程採取翻轉教室的作法，讓學生換個角色站上講台，把學到的內容說給大家聽。「老師們都會給予非常正向的回饋，並適時補充與引導，讓學習內容不只是『做完報告就結束』，而是真正被內化。」 同學表示，那些專業與英文能力的提升，並不是某一個瞬間突然發生，而是在這樣鼓勵參與、開放表達的課堂中，一點一滴累積起來。 #輔大國際經管 #跨國雙碩士 #FJCU_imMBA #Dual_Master_Degree 2026/02/09 (外國學生申請入學) Fall 2026, apply NOW!! (May 1 - May 31) - the second round 2026/01/28 【一個下午在超市：學生的海外學習初體驗】 相關連結 相片集錦 聯絡我們 Copyright ©2012-2024. College of Management, Fu Jen Catholic University Design by CREATOP
items.bodyEn: 【What does it feel like to study in the imMBA program?】Feb. 4, 2026
